case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AMERICAN INS. CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INS. CO. BILL HALL BAIL BOND SERVICE
